Berlin Painter

Red-Figure Lekythos (Oil Vessel): Athena Slaying Giant (body); Satyr between Maenads (shoulder)
by Berlin Painter
Greek, Attic · c. 490 BCE · ceramic
←Attributed to The Perugia Painter, now combined with the Arnò Painter Brygos Painter→
